name_en: Chanel 25C Lunch Box Bag, Calfskin with Metal Chain ⛓️. Double C logo design, compact size easily fits a phone and daily essentials. Whether paired with casual or formal wear, it's easy to handle. Choose simple clothing to let the bag be the focal point of the look. A perfect combination of elegance and practicality. Dimensions: 21.5×19×6cm
